A hash map can map value -> index.
questions.title: Two Sum
questions.prompt: Given an array of integers nums and an integer target, return indices of the two numbers such that they add up to target.

hints: Use a stack to match closing brackets with the most recent opening bracket.
questions.title: Valid Parentheses
questions.prompt: Given a string s containing just the characters '(', ')', '{', '}', '[' and ']', determine if the input string is valid.

hints: Think about using a hash map.
questions.title: Two Sum
questions.prompt: Given an array of integers, return indices of the two numbers such that they add up to a specific target.
